title: 🧹 Storage Sweeper & Heatmaps! 🚀
message: We've added powerful new tools to help you reclaim even more space and see exactly how compression works.
points: 🔍 Storage Sweeper: Automatically scan and find the largest photos hiding in your gallery.
🔥 Heatmap Vision: Toggle 'Show Loss' to see exactly which pixels are compressed.
📦 ZIP Export: Compress hundreds of photos and share them as a single ZIP archive.
⚡ Hardware Acceleration: Faster processing times for batch operations.

title: Critical Core Update
message: Important under-the-hood fixes for compression stability on older Android versions.
points: Fixed memory leaks during heavy batch compression
